verdict_details.show_exploded2: PARTIAL - InvokeTypes issue with VARIANT_BOOL param
verdict_details.liveness: FAIL - no explode step created, components don't move

investigation_summary.consistent_result: All AddExplodeStep calls return None (not 0, not error - just None)
investigation_summary.interpretation: IConfiguration.AddExplodeStep appears to require UI context/edit mode not available out-of-process

wall_characterization.signature: VT_DISPATCH return (IExplodeStep), args: VT_R8 distance, VT_BOOL*3 flags
wall_characterization.behavior: Returns None consistently in out-of-process COM automation
wall_characterization.likely_cause: SW exploded view editing requires UI interaction context (edit mode) that is not accessible via COM out-of-process
wall_characterization.similar_patterns: Other SW features requiring UI context: miter flange, certain pattern operations

deferred_reason: IConfiguration.AddExplodeStep returns None in out-of-process COM. Exploded view creation requires SW UI edit mode context not accessible from Python automation. Potential Route-C: in-process .NET add-in for explode step creation.

confirmed_recipe_partial.create_view: IAssemblyDoc.CreateExplodedView() -> True, creates empty exploded view
